sources.title: Google Page Quality Rating Scorecard - Zyppy SEO
sources.note: Cyrus Shepard's Google Page Quality Rating Scorecard, created based on his experience as a Google Quality Rater. A practical quality scoring framework for evaluating web pages against Google's Rater Guidelines.

sources.title: 5 Data-Backed Features of Websites Winning Google in 2026 - Zyppy Signal
sources.note: Cyrus Shepard's data-driven analysis of 400+ winning and losing websites, identifying 5 key features that predict Google success. Demonstrates his expertise in content quality scoring and maturity assessment.

sources.title: I Secretly Worked As A Google Search Quality Rater - Zyppy
sources.note: Cyrus Shepard's first-person account of working as a Google Quality Rater, providing insider perspective on content quality evaluation methodology.
